data.title: Dover Corp raises dividend to $0.52 per share, up from $0.515, an increase of $0.005 per share.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Downers Grove, Illinois, the Board of Directors at Dover Corporation (NYSE: DOV) announced a raise in its quarterly cash dividend from $0.515 to $0.52 per share. This increase equates to $0.005 per share.

data.title: Calidi Biotherapeutics (CLDI) reports Q2 2025 financial results and highlights, aiming to deliver genetic medicines.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. (NYSE American: CLDI) disclosed its second quarter 2025 operational and financial outcomes. The company, known for advancing targeted therapies capable of administering genetic medicines to distant disease sites, shared key business updates alongside this report.

data.title: NI Holdings, Inc. announced second quarter results for June 30, 2025, with detailed financial data.
data.description: In Fargo, North Dakota, NI Holdings, Inc. disclosed their quarterly results for the period concluding on June 30, 2025, on August 8, 2025. The announcement was made by the company trading under the stock symbol NODK on the NASDAQ.

data.title: RJM & Company's Metals & Mining Team to attend SMU Steel Summit 2025 in Atlanta from Aug 25 to 27, at Georgia World Congress Center.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, on August 8, 2025, it was revealed that RJM & Company's Metals & Mining Team will partake in the SMU Steel Summit 2025 at the Georgia World Congress Center in Atlanta, Georgia, from August 25 to August 27, 2025. This event marks a significant opportunity for industry professionals to convene and exchange insights on the latest trends in the steel sector.

data.title: John Hancock Closed-End Funds report earnings data for three months ended July 31, 2025. Includes Net Investment Income and Total Managed Assets.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, the John Hancock Closed-End Funds released their earnings report for the three months ending July 31, 2025. The data for the same period in 2024 is also provided. The key figures for the three months ended July 31, 2025 are as follows:- HPI Preferred Income Fund: Net Investment Income $7,097,887, Net Investment Income Per Common Share $0.265, NAV $16.02, Total Managed Assets $685,868,569, Total Net Assets $428,768,569.- HPF Preferred Income Fund II: Net Investment Income $5,740,643, Net Investment Income Per Common Share $0.266, NAV $15.87, Total Managed Assets $549,834,708, Total Net Assets $343,134,708.- HPS Preferred Income Fund III: Net Investment Income $7,672,694, Net Investment Income Per Common Share $0.239, NAV $14.29, Total Managed Assets $732,865,004, Total Net Assets $458,565,004.- JHS Income Securities Trust: Net Investment Income $1,650,927, Net Investment Income Per Common Share $0.142, NAV $12.19, Total Managed Assets $233,220,599, Total Net Assets $141,920,599.- JHI Investors Trust: Net Investment Income $2,517,561, Net Investment Income Per Common Share $0.288, NAV $14.81, Total Managed Assets $216,369,856, Total Net Assets $129,469,856.For a detailed report, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Westwood Holdings Group, Inc. reports Q2 2025 results: AUM at $18.3B, Russell 2000 Index inclusion, MDST at $100M, WEBs launches 11 sector funds.
data.description: Total Assets Under Management have increased to $18.3 billion, climbing from $16.8 billion the previous year. WHG has now become a part of the Russell 2000 Index in its 24th year as a publicly traded company. The Enhanced Midstream Energy ETF (MDST) has achieved over $100 million in assets, boasting a 10.2% annual distribution rate. WEBs Investments, collaborating with WHG, has expanded its Defined Volatility℠ ETF Suite by introducing 11 new Sector Funds.

data.title: PetSmart and its subsidiary price $1,950 million aggregate in notes offering.
data.description: Phoenix-based company PetSmart LLC disclosed on August 8, 2025, that it, along with its subsidiary PetSmart Finance Corp., has finalized the pricing for an offering worth $1.95 billion in total aggregate value. This offering represents a significant financial move for the company and its subsidiary.

data.title: Salama's strong H1 2025 performance: Net profit AED 8.25M, Q2 profit AED 7.86M. Equity growth 5.2% to AED 351.84M.
data.description: In the first half of 2025, Salama (DFM: "SALAMA"), a prominent company based in Dubai, UAE, reported a net profit of AED 8.25 million. This growth was primarily fueled by the second quarter profits, which amounted to AED 7.86 million. The company's equity position also showed a positive trend, reaching AED 351.84 million, marking a 5.2% increase from December 2024. The company's improved financial performance underscores its steady progress and strong market presence.

data.title: GEO Group to release Q2 earnings, expected EPS of $0.16, missed previous estimate by $0.05, shares trading at $21.5, up 66.31% in 52 weeks. Analysts await guidance impact on stock price.
data.description: GEO Group (NYSE: GEO) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, August 6, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.16 for the upcoming report, and investors are hopeful for positive news that surpasses estimates and provides optimistic guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, GEO Group missed EPS by $0.05, resulting in a 3.73% share price drop. Past performance shows varying EPS estimates and actual results, along with corresponding price changes. As of August 7, GEO Group shares were trading at $21.5, showing a 66.31% increase over the last 52 weeks. Analysts are closely monitoring market sentiments and expectations related to GEO Group to provide valuable insights for investors. GEO Group has received a total of 2 ratings from analysts. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Core Scientific's Q2 2025 revenue $78.6M, down from $141.1M in Q2 2024. Digital asset revenue $62.4M.
data.description: Core Scientific, Inc. (NASDAQ: CORZ) based in Austin, Texas, released their financial results for the fiscal second quarter of 2025. Total revenue for this quarter amounted to $78.6 million, marking a decrease from $141.1 million in the same period of 2024. Specifically, revenue from digital asset self-mining was reported at $62.4 million, down from $110.7 million in the previous year’s quarter. The primary reason for this decline was not mentioned in the announcement.

data.title: Trump administration imposes tariffs on imported gold; Michael Saylor says Bitcoin is tariff-free in cyberspace.
data.description: The imposition of tariffs on imported gold by the Trump administration has sparked a comparison between physical and digital stores of value by Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) Executive Chairman Michael Saylor. In an interview with Bloomberg, Saylor pointed out that "Bitcoin lives in cyberspace, no tariffs in cyberspace," highlighting the advantages of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) over traditional assets. The decision by the U.S. government to levy tariffs on imported gold bars is causing disruption in the precious metals market. Saylor believes this recent development further solidifies the case for favoring Bitcoin in the current economic landscape. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
